dosage: 81-325mg daily for heart, 500mg every 4-6 hours for pain
interactions: Avoid with blood thinners like Warfarin or NSAIDs like Ibuprofen
Avoid with alcohol or other liver-affecting drugs
Avoid with Aspirin or blood pressure meds
Avoid with other NSAIDs or steroids
Avoid with other NSAIDs or blood thinners
Avoid with antacids or heart meds
May reduce absorption of other meds like iron
Avoid with alcohol or kidney issues
Avoid with insulin if hypoglycemia risk
Avoid with NSAIDs or potassium supplements
Avoid with MAOIs or high BP meds
Avoid with certain meds like antibiotics
Avoid with MAOIs, alcohol, other SSRIs
